generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/dtdf#

instance SafetyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time safety assessment based on temperature thresholds"
]

instance OperationalOptimalityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of system operational efficiency and performance"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in the thermal control system"
]

instance StateEstimateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated system state using sensor data and models"
]

instance OptimizedParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized control parameters for thermal regulation"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted future system behavior based on current conditions"
]

instance CorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of heatbed and fan to correct temperature deviations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data analysis for safety and performance monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides [SafetyInsight, OperationalOptimalityInsight]
]

instance PredictiveService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of system behavior under current conditions for predictive analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides [PredictiveInsight]
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated detection of faults in the thermal control system"
    DTDFVocab:provides [FaultDetectedInsight]
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimation of system state using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:provides [StateEstimateInsight]
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of control parameters for thermal regulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides [OptimizedParametersInsight]
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control for maintaining system operational limits"
    DTDFVocab:provides [CorrectiveAction]
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware controller for real-time data processing and control adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:enables [MonitoringService, PredictiveService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, SupervisoryControlService]
]

instance RabbitMQServer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server for inter-component synchronization and communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables [MonitoringService, PredictiveService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService, SupervisoryControlService]
]

instance ScipyPackage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for optimization algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables [OptimizationService]
]

instance BoxInternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor with 0.5°C accuracy for internal temperature monitoring via 1-Wire bus"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BoxInternalTempData1
]

instance BoxInternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor with 0.5°C accuracy for internal temperature monitoring via 1-Wire bus"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BoxInternalTempData2
]

instance AmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External temperature sensor for ambient monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTempData
]

instance BoxInternalTempData1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BoxInternalTemperatureSensor1
]

instance BoxInternalTempData2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BoxInternalTemperatureSensor2
]

instance AmbientTempData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance BoxInternalTemperatureData1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal temperature data from first DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BoxInternalTempData1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4, ScipyPackage
]

instance BoxInternalTemperatureData2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal temperature data from second DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BoxInternalTempData2
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4, ScipyPackage
]

instance AmbientTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient temperature data from external sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTempData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4, ScipyPackage
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed for heating content with precise temperature regulation via low-level driver"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan for distributing heat with precise temperature regulation via low-level driver"
]

instance IncubatorBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam box forming the insulated chamber of the incubator"
]

instance Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Dedicated controller for managing heatbed and fan operations with defined operational limits"
]

instance CPSModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Cyber-Physical System model for thermal control simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyPackage
]

instance EnvironmentModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Environmental model for ambient conditions and system interactions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyPackage
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validation compares simulated behavior with empirical data trajectories (Section 3.3). Temperature uniformity was validated through experimental testing (Section 4.1), ensuring model accuracy under operational conditions."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is deployed on-premise using a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B as the hosting platform for both the controller and RabbitMQ communication server, providing local computational resources and storage. No cloud or edge deployment details are specified, and scalability is constrained by the Raspberry Pi's hardware capabilities."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Monitors assess the system's safety and operational optimality using real-time data from the Physical Twin; safety violations trigger corrective actions by human operators or algorithmic controls to adjust the Physical Twin's state."
]
